events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: a side-loaded shackle is a critical, fail-condition hazard — shackles are rated only for in-line pin loading, and side-loading induces bending/torsional stress that can cause pin back-out, bow deformation, or sudden load release. Immediate controls: stop the lift, de-tension safely, remove and inspect the shackle, reconfigure rigging for in-line loading, and get a qualified rigger's sign-off before resuming.
